description: Use this API to return an array of integer values for subsystem two-winding transformers. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.2.0. ierr, iarray = atrnint(sid, owner, ties, flag, entry, string)
python_syntax: ierr, iarray = atrnint(sid, owner, ties, flag, entry, string)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: Defines the bus subsystem to be used. (input; -1 by default).

parameters.name: owner
parameters.description: A flag indicating owner usage if ownership is a subsystem selection criterion (ignored if sid is negative). (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: ties
parameters.description: A flag indicating which subsystem two-winding transformers to include (ignored if sid is negative). (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: flag
parameters.description: A flag indicating which subsystem two-winding transformers to include. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: entry
parameters.description: A flag indicating organization. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: An array of NSTR elements specifying NSTR of the following strings indicating the transformer quantities desired. (input; no default allowed).

return_values.name: iarray
return_values.description: An array of NSTR*DIM elements specifying Is an array of at least NSTR columns, each of which contains DIM elements. (output).

sid.description: to instruct the API to assume a subsystem containing all buses in the working case.
valid bus subsystem identifier. Valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. Subsystem SID must have been previously defined.

ties.description: for interior subsystem two-winding transformers only.
for subsystem tie two-winding transformers only.
for both interior subsystem and tie two-winding transformers.

entry.description: for double entry (each branch in both directions).

string.description: From bus substation number (0 if bus is not in a substation).
To bus substation number (0 if bus is not in a substation).
From bus section number (0 if bus is not represented by multiple bus sections).
To bus section number (0 if bus is not represented by multiple bus sections).
From bus node number (0 if bus is not in a substation).
To bus node number (0 if bus is not in a substation).
Winding 1 bus substation number (0 if bus is not in a substation).
Winding 2 bus substation number (0 if bus is not in a substation).
Winding 1 bus section number (0 if bus is not represented by multiple bus sections).
Winding 2 bus section number (0 if bus is not represented by multiple bus sections).
Winding 1 bus node number (0 if bus is not in a substation).
Winding 2 bus node number (0 if bus is not in a substation).
Transformer control mode for automatic adjustments.
Winding 1 ratio limit code: -1 for low, 0 for regulating, 1 for high, -2 for locked, -3 for controlling a dc line.
Winding 1 angle limit code: -1 for low, 0 for regulating, 1 for high, -2 for locked.

error_codes.description: DIM, and hence the size of IARRAY, is not large enough.
Sequence data not in case (when STRING = ‘CZ0’, ‘CZG’ or ‘CNXCOD’).
